notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy. Tyler Freeman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Ezequiel Tovar.

notableEvents.label: Willi Castro grand slam
notableEvents.detail: Willi Castro hits a grand slam (5) to right field. Kyle Karros scores. Troy Johnston scores. Braxton Fulford scores.

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson grounds into a double play, shortstop Alika Williams to first baseman Jeff McNeil. Willi Castro out at 2nd. Sterlin Thompson out at 1st.
